examples.title: mEPSC Poisson Models Under Constant and Washout Magnesium
examples.description: Fits constant and piecewise Poisson GLM baselines to mEPSC spike trains.
examples.question: Do mEPSCs follow constant vs piecewise Poisson firing under Mg2+ washout?

examples.title: Whisker Stimulus GLM With Lag and History Selection
examples.description: Fits explicit-stimulus point-process GLMs and compares baseline, stimulus, and history models.
examples.question: How do explicit whisker stimulus and spike history improve thalamic GLM fits?

examples.title: PSTH and SSGLM Dynamics Example
examples.description: Bundles simulated PSTH and SSGLM examples from the canonical paper workflow.
examples.question: How do PSTH and SSGLM capture within-trial and across-trial dynamics?

examples.title: Place-Cell Receptive Fields (Gaussian vs Zernike)
examples.description: Loads place-cell datasets and compares receptive-field model families.
examples.question: Which receptive-field basis (Gaussian vs Zernike) better fits place cells?

examples.title: Stimulus Decoding With PPAF and PPHF
examples.description: Bundles univariate, reaching, and hybrid decoding examples from the paper workflow.
examples.question: How well do adaptive/hybrid point-process filters decode stimulus and reach state?

examples.title: 2-D Place-Field Recovery With a B-Spline GLM Basis and an LGCP Comparator
examples.description: Simulates a 2-D inhomogeneous Poisson process from a known log-Gaussian rate, recovers the rate via bspline_basis_2d + fit_poisson_glm, fits a comparator via lgcp_fit_glm, and runs pair_correlation + global_envelope with isotropic edge correction.
examples.question: How does a tensor-product B-spline Poisson GLM recover a known 2-D place field, and how do its rate and second-order diagnostics compare to an LGCP?

examples.title: Spatiotemporal Wave Analysis of a Synthetic Planar-Wave Hawkes Adjacency
examples.description: Constructs a synthetic planar-wave Hawkes adjacency on a grid of electrodes, computes the bartlett_spectrum, runs detect_wave_peaks, and verifies the recovered wave speed and direction against the ground-truth construction.
examples.question: Can the Bartlett spectrum and wave-peak detector recover the speed and direction of a known planar wave embedded in a multivariate Hawkes triggering matrix?

examples.title: Real Place-Cell Encoding-and-Decoding With Held-Out Spatial GoF
examples.description: Loads Animal 1 from the figshare paper dataset, fits a 4-cell B-spline Poisson GLM, decodes position with PPDecodeFilter on a 2-D random walk, and runs pair_correlation + global_envelope (isotropic) and rescaled_acf on the held-out half.
examples.question: Does a B-spline Poisson GLM trained on real hippocampal place cells produce a held-out spatial pair-correlation inside the inhomogeneous global-rank envelope, and a population rescaled-time ACF inside the Bartlett band?
